lines.english: When someone understands his own self,
he no longer suffers from illness and the three fevers. ||2||
They have been transformed into the peaceful, tranquil concentration of Samaadhi.
My body was afflicted with millions of diseases.
My mind has now been restored to its original purity.
When I became dead while yet alive, only then did I come to know the Lord.
Says Kabeer, I am now immersed in intuitive peace and poise.
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਨ ਡਰਉ ਨ ਅਵਰ ਡਰਾਵਉ ॥੩॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: aap na ddrau na avar ddaraavau |3|17|
lines.english: I do not fear anyone, and I do not strike fear into anyone else. ||3||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿੰਡਿ ਮੂਐ ਜੀਉ ਕਿਹ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: pindd mooai jeeo kih ghar jaataa |
lines.english: When the body dies, where does the soul go?
Only one who knows the Lord realizes Him.
It is absorbed into the untouched, unstruck melody of the Word of the Shabad.
The mind is satisfied and satiated, like the mute who eats the sugar candy and just smiles, without speaking. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਪਵਨ ਦ੍ਰਿੜ ਸੁਖਮਨ ਨਾਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man re pavan drirr sukhaman naaree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O mind, hold your breath steady within the central channel of the Sushmanaa. ||1||Pause||
Such is the spiritual wisdom which the Lord has imparted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਰਹੁ ਜਿ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਕਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: so gur karahu ji bahur na karanaa |
lines.english: Adopt such a Guru, that you shall not have to adopt another again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪਦੁ ਰਵਹੁ ਜਿ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਰਵਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: so pad ravahu ji bahur na ravanaa |
lines.english: Dwell in such a state, that you shall never have to dwell in any other.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਧਰਹੁ ਜਿ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਧਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: so dhiaan dharahu ji bahur na dharanaa |
lines.english: Embrace such a meditation, that you shall never have to embrace any other.
Turn your breath away from the left channel, and away from the right channel, and unite them in the central channel of the Sushmanaa.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਜਲ ਸੰਗਮ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਨੑਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin jal sangam man meh naavau |
lines.english: At their confluence within your mind, take your bath there without water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੇ ਮਰਹੁ ਜਿ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਮਰਨਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aise marahu ji bahur na maranaa |2|
lines.english: Die in such a way, that you shall never have to die again. ||2||
Contemplate this essence of reality - what else is there to contemplate? ||3||
To look upon all with an impartial eye - let this be your daily occupation.
Water, fire, wind, earth and ether

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਉ ਜਿ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਆਵਉ ॥੪॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: tit ghar jaau ji bahur na aavau |4|18|
lines.english: Go to that home, which you shall never have to leave. ||4||18||
adopt such a way of life and you shall be close to the Lord.
Says Kabeer, meditate on the Immaculate Lord.
Gauree, Kabeer Jee, Thi-Padhay:
He cannot be obtained by offering your weight in gold.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਦੇ ਰਾਮੁ ਲੀਆ ਹੈ ਮੋਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: man de raam leea hai mol |1|
lines.english: But I have bought the Lord by giving my mind to Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਮੋਹਿ ਰਾਮੁ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: ab mohi raam apunaa kar jaaniaa |
lines.english: Now I recognize that He is my Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਸੁਭਾਇ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj subhaae meraa man maaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My mind is intuitively pleased with Him. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮੈ ਕਥਿ ਕਥਿ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: brahamai kath kath ant na paaeaa |
lines.english: Brahma spoke of Him continually, but could not find His limit.
Because of my devotion to the Lord, He has come to sit within the home of my inner being. ||2||
Says Kabeer, I have renounced my restless intellect.
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:
It is my destiny to worship the Lord alone. ||3||1||19||
That death which terrifies the entire world

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਕੈਸੇ ਮਰਉ ਮਰਨਿ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: ab kaise mrau maran man maaniaa |
lines.english: Now, how shall I die? My mind has already accepted death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਿ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਤੇ ਜਿਨ ਰਾਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mar mar jaate jin raam na jaaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those who do not know the Lord, die over and over again, and then depart. ||1||Pause||
- the nature of that death has been revealed to me, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||1||
Everyone says, I will die, I will die.
But he alone becomes immortal, who dies with intuitive understanding. ||2||
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:
Says Kabeer, my mind is filled with bliss;
my doubts have been eliminated, and I am in ecstasy. ||3||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਤ ਨਹੀ ਠਉਰ ਮੂਲੁ ਕਤ ਲਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: kat nahee tthaur mool kat laavau |
lines.english: There is no special place where the soul aches; where should I apply the ointment?

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜਤ ਤਨ ਮਹਿ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਪਾਵਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: khojat tan meh tthaur na paavau |1|
lines.english: I have searched the body, but I have not found such a place. ||1||
He alone knows it, who feels the pain of such love;
I look upon all His soul-brides with an impartial eye;
the arrows of the Lord's devotional worship are so sharp! ||1||Pause||
how can I know which ones are dear to the Husband Lord? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਪਰਹਰਿ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੁਹਾਗੁ ॥੩॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: sabh parahar taa kau milai suhaag |3|21|
lines.english: - her Husband Lord turns all others away, and meets with her. ||3||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਕਬੀਰ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: kahu kabeer jaa kai masatak bhaag |
lines.english: Says Kabeer, one who has such destiny inscribed upon her forehead
